easy.description: Your inbox has promotional emails mixed with important ones. Archive ALL promotional emails to declutter your inbox. Leave urgent or important emails alone.

email_pool.subject: BOGO Deal!

medium.description: Your inbox has a mix of urgent alerts and newsletters. FLAG all urgent security or HR alerts. ARCHIVE all newsletters and promotional digests. Urgent emails have keywords like ALERT, Policy, Expires, or Emergency.

email_pool.subject: LOGIN ALERT: Unusual Activity
email_pool.snippet: A login was detected from an unknown device.

email_pool.subject: Policy Update — Action Required
email_pool.snippet: You must acknowledge by this Friday.

email_pool.subject: Your Password Expires Today
email_pool.snippet: Reset immediately to avoid lockout.

email_pool.subject: Expense Report Due — EOD
email_pool.snippet: Submit your report before end of business day.

email_pool.subject: EMERGENCY: Join meeting now
email_pool.snippet: Drop everything. Conference room B.

email_pool.subject: Monday Morning Tips
email_pool.snippet: 5 productivity hacks for the week ahead.

email_pool.subject: Q4 Industry Report is Out

email_pool.subject: AI News You Missed This Week

email_pool.subject: Campaign Performance Results
email_pool.snippet: Click to see this month's metrics.

email_pool.subject: 5 Articles Curated for You
email_pool.snippet: Catch up on what you missed.

hard.description: Critical mixed inbox. FLAG all high-priority alerts (system failures, client escalations). MOVE project task emails to the Work folder. IGNORE or leave spam alone — do NOT archive or flag it.

email_pool.subject: SYSTEM DOWN — Production Outage
email_pool.snippet: All services offline. Immediate response required.

email_pool.subject: Project Budget: Needs Approval
email_pool.snippet: Client is waiting. Escalated to priority.

email_pool.subject: DATA BREACH DETECTED
email_pool.snippet: Unauthorized access detected at 3:14AM.

email_pool.subject: CRITICAL: Board Prep Required
email_pool.snippet: Need your slides before 9AM tomorrow.

email_pool.subject: Task: Update Project Docs
email_pool.snippet: Please move to work tracker and complete by Friday.

email_pool.subject: Bug: Fix Login Flow — Assigned
email_pool.snippet: Ticket #442. Belongs in your work queue.

email_pool.subject: Review: UI Mockups for Sprint 4
email_pool.snippet: Needs your sign-off before dev starts.

email_pool.subject: Test Run Failed — Investigate
email_pool.snippet: 3 critical tests failed in staging.

email_pool.snippet: You have been selected. Claim now.
